title: Hornwort RNA extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ctu","text":"The same protocol used for DNA extraction is used for RNA extraction with the addition of an overnight RNA precipitation step with LiCl.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"ff0pi","text":"All solutions used during this protocol were prepared using DEPC water!!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"dtjDm","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"KTc0O","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"4aQ0J","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"csqb1","text":"Extraction buffer:
100mM Tris-HCL pH 8 (2M)               25ml
1.4M NaCl  (5M)                                   140ml
20mM EDTA pH 8 (0.5M)                    20ml
2% CTAB                                                10gr
 
0.3% β-mercaptoethanol                    150μl/50ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":125966,"guid":"41A001E3341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Polyvinylpyrrolidone","mol_weight":40,"sku":"PVP40","url":"https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/product/sial/pvp40?lang=en&region=US","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":17,"name":"Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)","link":"http://sigmaaldrich.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":126270,"guid":"41A0670C341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Chloroform","mol_weight":0,"sku":"319988","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":17,"name":"Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)","link":"http://sigmaaldrich.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Grind 0.5-2 g of tissue using mortar and pestle in the presence of liquid nitrogen until finely ground. Transfer frozen ground tissue to a 30 ml tube.
Add 10 ml of 60 o C extraction buffer and 100 mg PVP-40/g tissue. Mix by inversion and incubate in 60 o C in a water bath for 30 min (or incubate on ice for 15 min).
Remove from heat, and let cool to room temperature for 4 to 6 min.
Add 12 ml of chloroform:IAA (24:1) and mix by inversion to form an emulsion.
After mixing thoroughly, spin at 10,000 rpm for 10 min at RT.
Transfer aqueous phase to a new 30 ml centrifuge tube. Repeat chloroform:IAA extraction to remove cloudiness (PVP) in aqueous phase. Spin at 7,000 rpm for 10 min at RT.

Add ½ volume of 5M NaCl to the final aqueous solution recovered. Mix well. Add two volumes of cold (-20 o C) 95% ethanol. Mix by inversion. Place in freezer (-20 o C) for 10 min to accentuate precipitation. Spin at 13,000 rpm for 6 min.
Optional: Resuspend in 2 ml of TE and repeat step 7.
Pour off supernatant. And wash pellet with cold (0 to 4 o C) 70% v/v ethanol. Dry pellet.
Dissolve in 400 μl TE and add 100ul 8M LiCl. Incubate o/n at 4 o C.
Spin 10 min to pellet RNA . Remove supernatant (contains DNA).
Dissolve pellet with 400ul DEPC dH2O. Add 40ul NaoAc (pH 4.5) and 1ml 95% EtOH and freeze at -80 oC for 10 min. (optional: wash pellet with 95% EtOH).
Spin for 10 min at 13K and resuspend pellet in 40ul DEPC dH 2 O.

If necessary (pellet not dissolved): incubate at 60 o C for 10 min and then on ice for 30 min. Pellet debris by spinning tube for 10 min at 13K. Transfer supernatant (RNA) to a new tube.Extraction buffer:100mM Tris-HCL pH 8 (2M)25ml.
creator: Eftychis Frangedakis
